raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 366 will expand the use of ignition interlock devices (IIDs) to all DUI offenders in California.",
    "California currently requires IID installation for repeat DUI offenders and in certain first-time cases.",
    "California's IID laws are set to expire at the end of 2025, which would leave the state without protections against impaired drivers.",
    "In states where Ignition Interlock Devices are required, DUI arrests have dropped by 15%.",
    "In states that have implemented all-offender IID laws, drunk driving fatalities have dropped by 26%.",
    "In 2023 alone, IIDs prevented more than 30,500 attempts to drive drunk in California."
  ]
}
```
